title: Tough Egg
move_pattern: Starts with Hatch. Then loops Nibble indefinitely.
notes: The Tough Egg begins combat with 2 stacks of HatchPower. On its first turn, it hatches: removes HatchPower and all non-Minion powers, then its HP is replaced with Hatchling HP (20–23 at ascension). After hatching, the monster's title changes to 'Hatchling' and it loops Nibble indefinitely. If the egg enters combat already hatched, it skips the Hatch move and begins directly on Nibble.
